name: Venture Global LNG, Inc.
content: Venture Global LNG is a long-term, low-cost provider of American-produced liquefied natural gas (LNG) sourced from resource-rich North American natural gas basins. The company is developing a series of LNG export terminals in Louisiana, including the Calcasieu Pass, Plaquemines LNG, and CP2 LNG facilities. By utilizing a highly efficient, mid-scale liquefaction technology, Venture Global aims to provide clean and reliable energy to global markets while maintaining a commitment to environmental sustainability and operational excellence in the energy infrastructure sector.
